scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.clean: rmdir /s /q dist android\app\build 2>nul || echo Clean complete
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm install && npm run android:sync
scripts.bapk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat clean assembleDebug && cd .. && copy android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk public\saloAlaMohamed.apk
scripts.devm: adb wait-for-device && adb reverse tcp:8100 tcp:8100 && npm run build && npx cap sync && cd android && .\gradlew.bat clean assembleDebug && adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
